_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to communicate complex information, concepts, or ideas in a confident and well-organized manner through verbal, written, and/or visual means.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in building and presenting AI proof-of-concept demonstrations to executive audiences, communicating capability, limitations, and path to production.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-019 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-A-004 (LS, cosine: 0.456), RC-A-003 (RC, cosine: 0.434).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.512). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [ability, communicate, complex, concepts, confident, ideas] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, audiences, building, capability, communicating, concept] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.858 (P=0.849, R=0.868). Balanced P/R — the 20-word DCWF element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Ability to communicate complex information, concepts, or ideas in a confident an" and "Skill in building and presenting AI proof-of-concept demonstrations to executive" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.467 ≈ STS 0.512 (gap 0.045). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.6%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [ability, communicate, complex, concepts, confident, ideas]. WIDAI terms: [ai, audiences, building, capability, communicating, concept].
